scripts.typecheck: node --input-type=module -e "import { readdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import { join } from 'node:path'; import { runHiddenPostureCommandSync } from '@narada2/process-launch-posture'; const files = readdirSync('src').filter((file) => file.endsWith('.mjs')).sort(); for (const file of files) { const result = runHiddenPostureCommandSync(process.execPath, ['--check', join('src', file)], { stdio: 'inherit', posture: 'test_child' }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); }"
